text:
When Casio Exilim EX-Z500 camera is plugged into a usb port system goes
into panic with Zero Divide Overflow - camera seems to give wrong data
about it's Flashcard's size, which is 0 and so, C/H/S also 0/0/0.

Fix: 

I'll try to fix it, but I'm a beginner in C++
How-To-Repeat: Plug in Casio Exilim
